message:
test(fuzz): RevocationSlaChecker C1.4 zone-wide SLA (unwjz)

Add fuzz_revocation_sla_checker covering RevocationSlaChecker (revocation.rs:853)
— the C1.4 zone-wide revocation freshness SLA primitive. Compares
ZoneCheckpoint's revocation_freshness_sla_secs against time to determine
DEGRADED revocation state. Properties: check_sla boundary (age <= sla
→ Fresh, > sla → Breached{age - sla}), saturating subtraction on clock
skew (now < checkpoint_updated_at → Fresh), is_fresh ⇔ Fresh,
may_proceed Critical ⇔ check_sla.is_fresh, may_proceed Risky/Safe always
true, determinism. Once-gated anchors verify the <= boundary, +1
overdue, age=0, clock-skew, Critical-rejection-on-Breached, Risky/Safe
always-proceed, sla_secs=0 corner case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1190,5 +1190,12 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_revocation_sla_checker"
+path = "fuzz_targets/revocation_sla_checker.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
